Attendees

Jackie Adedokun

Jackie is a Research Specialist with the Department of Psychiatry at the University of Pittsburgh.

Abass Babatunde

Abassis a Postdoctoral Fellow with the Institute for the Advancement of Community Health at Furman University.

Ashlyn Barry

Ashlyn is a Graduate Student with the Department of Kinesiology at the University of Wisconsin - Madison.

Stefani Baca-Atlas

Stefani is a Postdoctoral Fellow in the Carolina Population Center at the University of North Carolina - Chapel Hill.

Morgan Brucks

Morgan is a Senior Research Associate with the Department of Population Health at the University of Kansas Medical Center.

Wasayef Bsharat

Wasayef is a Graduate Student with the Department of Clinical Psychology at Montclair State University.

Julianne Clina

Julianne is a Postdoctoral Fellow with the Division of Physical Activity and Weight Mangagement in the Department of Internal Medicine at the University of Kansas Medical Center.

Kellie Collins

Kellie is a Graduate Student in Clinical Investigation with the Department of Pediatrics at the University of Wisconsin - Madison.

Bethany Forseth

Bethany is an Assistant Professor with the Department of Physical Therapy, Rehabilitation Science, and Athletic Training at the University of Kansas Medical Center.

Sara Fortin-Miller

Sara is a Postdoctoral Fellow with the Department of Population Health at the University of Kansas Medical Center.

Elham Ghanbarian

Elham is a Postdoctoral Fellow with the Department of Neurology at the University of California, Irvine.

Rachel Hantman

Rachel is a Graduate Student with the Department of Psychology at the University of South Carolina.

John Heap

John is a Graduate Student with the School of Medicine at the University of Kansas Medical Center.

Brian Helsel

Brian is an Assistant Professor with the University of Kansas Alzheimer’s Disease Research Center in the Department of Neurology at the University of Kansas Medical Center.

Rashelle Hoffman

Rashelle is an Assistant Professor with the Department of Physical Therapy at Creighton University.

Dominic Javonillo

Dominic is a Graduate Student with the Department of Neurobiology & Behavior at the University of California, Irvine.

Melissa Jenkins

Melissa is a Postdoctoral Fellow with the Waisman Center at the University of Wisconsin - Madison.

Sullafa Kadura

Sullafa is an Associate Professor with the Departmnet of Medicine at the University of Pittsburgh.

Jessica Keller

Jessica is a Postdoctoral Fellow with the Department of Anesthesiology at the University of Kansas Medical Center

Mason McClarnon

Mason is a research assistant with the School of Pharmacy and Health Professions at Creighton University.

Yasaman Razavi

Yasaman is an Associate Specialist with the Department of Anesthesia at the University of California San Francisco.

Sadaf Salehi

Sadaf is an Associate Researcher with the Multiple Sclerosis Research Center at the Tehran University of Medical Sciences.

Leela Shah

Leela is a Graduate Student with the Waisman Center at the University of Wisconsin - Madison.

Keith Smith

Keith is a Senior Research Associate with the University of Kansas Alzheimer’s Disease Research Center in the Department of Neurology at the University of Kansas Medical Center.

Kameron Suire

Kameron is an Assistant Professor of Exercise Science with the Department of Kinesiology at Berry College.

David Titus

David is a Neuroscientist with the Department of Veterinary Clinical Sciences at the University of Minnesota Twin Cities.

Ainsley VanderGiesen

Ainsley is a Clinical Research Assistant with the Department of Anesthesiology at the University of Kansas Medical Center.

Elyse Vetter

Elyse is a Graduate Student with the Department of Neurology at the University of Kansas Medical Center.

Ian Weidling

Ian is a Postdoctoral Fellow with the Department of Neurology at the University of Kansas Medical Center.
